source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/00_기타 작업 서류/251021 - 소재지 변경에 따른 문서 업데이트/참고 - G series 사용 x 공통 DHF 참조/Blue_Recharger Label_251022.pptx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Final Rev.2.0 Battery Recharger label for model DEPS126002 with Korean manufacture, address, electrical ratings, cautions, certification identifier, and serial number placeholder.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Product labeling reference for Battery Recharger model DEPS126002.
keyPoints: Final label is marked Rev.2.0 and Made in Korea.
Product Name is Battery Recharger and Model Name is DEPS126002.
Input is 15V 3A and Output is 12.6V 1.3A for Channel 1 and 2 each.
Label includes cautions for battery replacement, equivalent type replacement, and avoiding crush, puncture, incineration, or short circuit of external contacts.
Revision history lists Rev.2 dated 25.10.10 for address correction, 1F deletion, and European representative name, address, contact, and email information correction.

entities.name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.

entities.evidence: Made in Korea H&abyz Co., Ltd. 2-dong, 41-16, Cheoinseong-ro , Namsa-eup , Cheoin-gu , Yongin-si , Gyeonggi-do , 17118, Republic of Korea

concepts.name: Battery replacement caution
concepts.evidence: Caution: 1) Danger of explosion if battery is incorrectly replaced. 2) Replace only with the same or equivalent type.

concepts.name: External contacts short circuit caution
concepts.evidence: Do not crush, puncture, incinerate or short circuit external contacts.

evidence.claim: The document is a final Recharger Label at Rev.2.0.
The labeled product is Battery Recharger model DEPS126002.
evidence.evidenceText: Product Name: Battery Recharger Model Name : DEPS126002

evidence.claim: The manufacturer shown on the final label is H&abyz Co., Ltd. in Republic of Korea.
evidence.evidenceText: Made in Korea H&abyz Co., Ltd. 2-dong, 41-16, Cheoinseong-ro , Namsa-eup , Cheoin-gu , Yongin-si , Gyeonggi-do , 17118, Republic of Korea

evidence.claim: The final label lists input as 15V 3A.
The final label lists output as 12.6V 1.3A for channels 1 and 2 each.
The final label includes certification identifier R-R-abz-DEPS126002.
The label warns of danger of explosion if the battery is incorrectly replaced.
evidence.evidenceText: Caution: 1) Danger of explosion if battery is incorrectly replaced.

evidence.claim: The label instructs replacement only with the same or equivalent type.
evidence.evidenceText: 2) Replace only with the same or equivalent type.

evidence.claim: The label warns not to crush, puncture, incinerate, or short circuit external contacts.
evidence.evidenceText: 3) Do not crush, puncture, incinerate or short circuit external contacts.

evidence.claim: Revision history lists Rev.2 dated 25.10.10 for address and European representative information corrections.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority is ambiguous: source includes Republic of Korea and identifier R-R-abz-DEPS126002, but no regulatory authority name is stated.
No standards are cited in the source text.
Document date is taken from the Rev.2 revision-history date, not from a separately labeled document date field.
Slides also include old draft label content with placeholder model and ratings; extracted document fields use the final Rev.2.0 label.
